prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically pertains to a water abstraction application in Dorset, England, and is governed by the Environment Agency, which operates under English law. Therefore, it does not apply to Scotland or any other nation within the UK.
